# Workflow Standards

## Why helpful

Workflows enforce quality checks in CI so standards are not only local/editor-based.

## How to use

1. Keep workflows small and focused.
2. Add reusable checks (format, lint, test gates).
3. Copy workflow templates into project repos.

1. Keep workflows focused and fast.
2. Fail clearly with actionable output.
3. Use least privilege permissions.
4. Prefer reusable checks that can be copied into project repos.
